docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $975.00 FILED BY CUEVA, LIZA AS TO DEFENDANT FABIANI, ANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF APPEARED ASKING IF SHE WAS ON CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF ASKED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE, SAID SHE DID NOT HAVE IT AND LEFT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506) ++++PLEASE SEE NOTES++++
